requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Direction vs GB/T 20234; GB/T Presence Due to Chinese Vehicle Imports
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向与GB/T 20234；中国进口车辆导致GB/T接口并存
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向與GB/T 20234；中國進口車輛導致GB/T接口並存

summary.en: Tajikistan's nascent EV charging infrastructure is oriented toward the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem, which is the dominant standard adopted by countries transitioning from Soviet-era electrical norms toward international IEC alignment. For AC charging, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) is the expected coupler; for DC fast charging, IEC 62196-3 CCS2 (Combined Charging System Combo 2) is the technically preferred interface. However, an important practical complication exists: Tajikistan imports a significant share of its consumer vehicles from China, and Chinese-market EVs carry GB/T 20234 vehicle inlets. This creates a dual-connector reality on the ground — infrastructure oriented toward IEC 62196 / CCS2 will not charge Chinese-market EVs, and vice versa. There is no confirmed single mandatory connector standard for public EV chargers in Tajikistan as of 2026-06-14; project or operator specifications must be confirmed before hardware is ordered.
summary.zh: 塔吉克斯坦初期电动汽车充电基础设施以IEC 62196接口体系为方向，这也是从苏联时代电气规范向国际IEC体系转型的国家所采用的主流标准。交流充电预期采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充技术上优选IEC 62196-3 CCS2接口。然而，存在一项重要实际复杂因素：塔吉克斯坦从中国进口大量消费类汽车，而中国市场电动汽车配备GB/T 20234车辆接口。这在实地形成了双接口并存局面——面向IEC 62196 / CCS2的基础设施无法为中国市场电动汽车充电，反之亦然。截至2026年6月14日，塔吉克斯坦尚无经确认的公共充电桩单一强制接口标准；须在订购硬件前确认具体项目或运营商规范。
summary.zht: 塔吉克斯坦初期電動汽車充電基礎設施以IEC 62196接口體系為方向，這也是從蘇聯時代電氣規範向國際IEC體系轉型的國家所採用的主流標準。交流充電預期採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充技術上優選IEC 62196-3 CCS2接口。然而，存在一項重要實際複雜因素：塔吉克斯坦從中國進口大量消費類汽車，而中國市場電動汽車配備GB/T 20234車輛接口。這在實地形成了雙接口並存局面——面向IEC 62196 / CCS2的基礎設施無法為中國市場電動汽車充電，反之亦然。截至2026年6月14日，塔吉克斯坦尚無經確認的公共充電樁單一強制接口標準；須在訂購硬件前確認具體項目或運營商規範。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler (present in Tajikistan via Chinese vehicle imports)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall size to the IEC 62196 Type 2 but differs in connector gender (GB/T uses a male connector at the charger side and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement — making the two physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and communicate via CAN bus using GB/T 27930, incompatible with CCS2's IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. Chinese vehicle imports into Tajikistan create practical demand for GB/T-compatible infrastructure, but this does not constitute a regulatory requirement and should be confirmed with the project owner.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2整体尺寸相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2几何形状不同，通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国车辆进口至塔吉克斯坦在实践中产生了对GB/T兼容基础设施的需求，但这并不构成监管要求，须向项目业主确认。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2整體尺寸相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2幾何形狀不同，通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國車輛進口至塔吉克斯坦在實踐中產生了對GB/T兼容基礎設施的需求，但這並不構成監管要求，須向項目業主確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: The connector gap has two dimensions in Tajikistan: (1) For IEC-direction projects, a China GB/T-only charger requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN → IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2), labels, test reports, and temperature-rise evidence — adapters are not accepted as a project-compliant substitute; (2) For projects or operators serving Chinese-brand EVs, GB/T 20234 connectors may be operationally necessary, in which case Chinese charger hardware may be directly usable, but the regulatory and conformity basis should still be confirmed with Tajikstandart. Multi-standard chargers offering both IEC 62196 Type 2 and GB/T 20234 connectors may be the most practical hardware choice for early Tajikistan deployments given the mixed vehicle fleet, but this is a commercial decision, not a confirmed regulatory requirement.
gap.zh: 塔吉克斯坦的接口差距有两个维度：(1) 对于IEC方向的项目，仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩须对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（GB/T 27930 CAN→CCS2的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告和温升证据进行硬件重新设计——转接器不是项目合规的替代方案；(2) 对于服务中国品牌电动汽车的项目或运营商，GB/T 20234接口可能在实际运营中不可或缺，在此情况下中国充电桩硬件可能可直接使用，但其监管和合格评定依据仍须向Tajikstandart确认。考虑到车辆类型混杂，同时提供IEC 62196 Type 2和GB/T 20234接口的多标准充电桩可能是塔吉克斯坦早期部署最实用的硬件选择，但这属于商业决策，而非经确认的监管要求。
gap.zht: 塔吉克斯坦的接口差距有兩個維度：(1) 對於IEC方向的項目，僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁須對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（GB/T 27930 CAN→CCS2的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告和溫升證據進行硬件重新設計——轉接器不是項目合規的替代方案；(2) 對於服務中國品牌電動汽車的項目或運營商，GB/T 20234接口可能在實際運營中不可或缺，在此情況下中國充電樁硬件可能可直接使用，但其監管和合格評定依據仍須向Tajikstandart確認。考慮到車輛類型混雜，同時提供IEC 62196 Type 2和GB/T 20234接口的多標準充電樁可能是塔吉克斯坦早期部署最實用的硬件選擇，但這屬於商業決策，而非經確認的監管要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no single mandatory connector standard confirmed for Tajikistan public chargers as of 2026-06-14; IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is the IEC-direction expectation; GB/T connectors may be operationally needed for Chinese vehicle fleet; project or operator specification must be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is mandatory for China domestic connector design; in Tajikistan it may satisfy the Chinese-vehicle-fleet use case but does not address IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability and is not a substitute for Tajikstandart conformity confirmation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tajikistan's mixed vehicle fleet (IEC 62196-compatible international EVs alongside GB/T-equipped Chinese imports) makes connector selection non-trivial. Confirm the target vehicle fleet and project specification before hardware commitment. IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 and GB/T 20234 are physically incompatible — a dual-standard charger is the only hardware solution that serves both.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塔吉克斯坦混合车辆结构（IEC 62196兼容的国际电动汽车与配备GB/T接口的中国进口车辆并存）使接口选型复杂化。在确定硬件方案前，须确认目标车辆类型和项目规范。IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2与GB/T 20234在物理上不兼容——双标准充电桩是同时服务两类车辆的唯一硬件方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塔吉克斯坦混合車輛結構（IEC 62196兼容的國際電動汽車與配備GB/T接口的中國進口車輛並存）使接口選型複雜化。在確定硬件方案前，須確認目標車輛類型和項目規範。IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2與GB/T 20234在物理上不兼容——雙標準充電樁是同時服務兩類車輛的唯一硬件方案。
